description: Governed HIVE task metadata for workflow presets, workflow graph nodes, execution policies and operator-visible task cards.

defaults.description: Supports a bounded HIVE operations workflow with review-gated production handoff.
defaults.when_to_use: Use when the operator request matches this task or workflow stage.

items.title: Audit report review
items.description: Summarises operational audit bundles and turns findings into future-facing QA improvements.
items.when_to_use: Use for RAMS, AIMS, HIVE or ecosystem audit reports and readiness evidence.

items.title: Repo/debug bundle
items.description: Inspects repo ZIPs, CI logs and stack traces to identify a safe, minimal patch path.
items.when_to_use: Use when uploaded source files or logs need grounded debugging.

items.title: CI/log analysis
items.description: Finds the first meaningful CI, deployment or runtime error and recommends the next safe check.
items.when_to_use: Use for GitHub Actions, Koyeb, Pages and runtime log triage.

items.title: Social content QA
items.description: Reviews posts, captions, hooks and RSS rewrites against brand and platform QA gates.
items.when_to_use: Use for future-facing content QA and guardrail checks.

items.title: Podcast episode review
items.description: Reviews transcripts, episode metadata and RSS copy for clarity, discoverability and amplification.
items.when_to_use: Use for podcast transcript, show-note and episode-page checks.

items.title: eBook keyword review
items.description: Reviews eBook keyword evidence, catalogue fit and niche-gap signals without live-market guessing.
items.when_to_use: Use for KDP keyword council, catalogue positioning and niche-gap reviews.

items.title: Audit review workflow
items.description: Plans an evidence-led audit review with candidate skills, risk gates and an execution review record.
items.when_to_use: Use when an audit bundle needs clear findings and a safe improvement plan.

items.title: Repo/debug workflow
items.description: Plans a repo or deployment debug pass from evidence gathering through review-gated patch handoff.
items.when_to_use: Use when source, logs or CI results point to a repo-level fix.

items.title: Content QA workflow
items.description: Plans a brand-safe review of social, RSS, blog, podcast or eBook content outputs.
items.when_to_use: Use when content needs QA, platform-fit checks or future guardrail improvements.

items.title: Skills registry workflow
items.description: Plans skill search, routing, registry cleanup and metadata checks without installing or executing skills.
items.when_to_use: Use when the skill catalogue needs routing, integrity or description checks.

items.title: Operator request
items.description: Captures the operator's requested task and preserves it as the starting evidence for the workflow.
items.when_to_use: Appears at the start of every generated workflow graph.

items.title: Classify workflow
items.description: Classifies the requested repo, lane, preset and risk posture before selecting supporting skills.
items.when_to_use: Appears when HIVE turns an operator request into a workflow graph.

items.title: Recommend skills
items.description: Selects bounded candidate skills from the registry for planning only; no skill is installed or run.
items.when_to_use: Use when a workflow needs candidate skills before evidence gathering.

items.title: Collect evidence
items.description: Gathers configured R2, D1, SQL and Vectorize evidence needed to support the planned output.
items.when_to_use: Use before proposing any change, patch or operational action.

items.title: Generate dry-run output
items.description: Produces a reviewable output, patch plan or recommendation without mutating live systems.
items.when_to_use: Use before requesting approval for medium or high-impact work.

items.title: Risk gate
items.description: Checks candidate risk and blocks production handoff until required review criteria are satisfied.
items.when_to_use: Use before any approved adapter handoff or production-impacting change.

items.title: Execution review queue
items.description: Stores the plan for human approval, rejection or change requests before production handoff.
items.when_to_use: Use when a plan must be reviewed before execution can be unlocked.

items.title: Production adapter handoff
items.description: Hands an approved plan to allow-listed production adapters; approval does not auto-run background work.
items.when_to_use: Use only after an explicit human approval marks the plan ready.

items.title: Repository hygiene
items.description: Reports duplicate, generated and stale files so cleanup can be reviewed as a separate commit.
items.when_to_use: Use when root patch notes, generated artefacts or local cache files are cluttering the repo.
